channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth

item.title: America will come to regret its war on taxes
item.description: "Explore the unintended consequences of America's anti-tax mindset in our thought-provoking podcast, 'America Will Come to Regret Its War on Taxes'. Join us as we delve into the history, politics, and economics behind the US tax system and predict the potential long-term effects on the nation's future."
